title: Relevant Laws on Social Security for Seafarers
content: Without prejudice to established policy, collective bargaining agreement or other applicable employment agreement, all seafarers shall be entitled to compensation and benefits under the POEA SEC and benefits provided for by the Welfare Fund for Overseas Workers, Pag-IBIG Fund (Republic Act No. 7742), PhilHealth (Republic Act No. 7875, as amended by Republic Act No. 9241), Employees' Compensation Law (Presidential Decree No. 626, as amended), and the Social Security Law (Republic Act No 1161 as amended by Republic Act No. 8282), and other applicable laws.

metadata.source_file: Rules and Regulations on the Employment of Seafarers Onboard Philippine Registered Ships Engaged in International Voyage - Department Order No. 130, Series of 2013.pdf
